description: Sales & Marketing Review template — framework index with page references

frameworks.name: 6 Marketing Questions
frameworks.summary: Explores 6 key questions to ensure the advisor has considered value from the customer's perspective.
frameworks.helps: Get clear on who you serve, how you add value and what makes you special.

frameworks.name: Product Fit
frameworks.summary: Explores the trade-offs between business profitability and customer acceptance. Pages 7–9.
frameworks.helps: Increase sales conversions from marketing leads generated. Even below-average salespeople should be able to win sales with the right product/service fit.

frameworks.name: 10 Marketing Messages
frameworks.summary: Explores 10 marketing statements that speak to the purchase decision points of the customer.
frameworks.helps: Convert what's been defined in the marketing questions into sticky outbound marketing messages.

frameworks.name: Customer Type Table
frameworks.summary: Summarises customer types mapped to product fit.
frameworks.helps: Identify specific messaging for customer types vs general messaging for wider market coverage.

frameworks.name: A.I.D.C.R.A Advertisement Framework
frameworks.summary: Explains the logical order to construct an advertisement.
frameworks.helps: Build more effective adverts and have a review framework for A and B testing.

frameworks.name: Digital Funnel Storyboard
frameworks.summary: Explores sequential offerings, messaging and responses to entice target customers from their couch to the cash register.
frameworks.helps: Get clear on how to utilise all marketing assets in one comprehensive plan.

frameworks.name: (Outbound) Messaging Plan
frameworks.summary: Helps schedule messaging activities and explores Medium, Platform, Time & Cost as planning considerations.
frameworks.helps: Execute an effective campaign amongst all other business activities and responsibilities.

frameworks.name: (Inbound) Landing Page Review
frameworks.summary: Defines the reader's logic and landing page logic to help sequence text, graphics & widgets.
frameworks.helps: Build an effective landing page to convert more marketing leads into sales opportunity.

frameworks.name: Sparketing (Friction) Review
frameworks.summary: Reviews the product from a 'what stops people from buying it?' vs features/profitability perspective.
frameworks.helps: Get clear on what the customer will happily pay for, what they don't care about, and what they don't want.

frameworks.name: Branding Review
frameworks.summary: Helps align logo, graphics, message, market promise and story so they stick in the customer's mind.
frameworks.helps: Build powerful mental associations that create lasting influence in the mind of the target customer.

frameworks.name: Customer Loyalty Programme
frameworks.summary: Clarifies the purpose of a customer loyalty programme and ensures it translates into profits.
frameworks.helps: Stop giving things away if they don't make a measurable improvement in business profits.

frameworks.name: Pricing
frameworks.summary: Encourages a review of pricing beyond simply lifting or dropping it. Price should reflect the value provided.
frameworks.helps: Money is an exchange of value; be clear on the value you offer to price in a sustainable fashion.

frameworks.name: Packaging/Bundling
frameworks.summary: Guides a review of how packaging supports the big promise and client perception.
frameworks.helps: Use packaging and bundled solutions to influence the purchasing decision, price point and quality perceptions.

frameworks.name: Sales Channel Options
frameworks.summary: Explores different sales channel options and encourages a pros and cons discussion.
frameworks.helps: Identify a variety of ways to engage salespeople to sell products or services to a wider market.

frameworks.name: Sales Process Review
frameworks.summary: Encourages a review of the sales process from both customer and salesperson perspectives.
frameworks.helps: Know what to say and when to say it to help a customer choose to do business with you.

frameworks.name: Drafting Tender Proposals
frameworks.summary: Notes and ideas to incorporate in tender applications. General reading rather than a focused session.
frameworks.helps: General guidance for improving tender application success.
